get.description: Returns a role with its permissions

put.description: Updates a role's name, description, and permissions

delete.description: Deletes a role (users will lose this role)

get.summary: Get a maintenance request by ID

put.summary: Update the status of a maintenance request
Assign a maintainer to a maintenance request

post.summary: Globally resend a failed or undelivered notification

get.description: Returns all roles defined for the current tenant

post.description: Creates a new role with specified permissions
Removes a role from a user
Assigns a role to a user

post.summary: Resend a failed or undelivered notification for the current tenant

get.summary: List all maintenance requests with cursor pagination
List parts for a maintenance request

post.summary: Add a part item to a maintenance request

get.summary: List comments for a maintenance request

post.summary: Add a comment to a maintenance request
Create a new preventative maintenance schedule

get.summary: List all maintainers with cursor pagination

post.description: Verifies the 6-digit OTP and returns a short-lived verification token
Sets the initial password after OTP verification and auto-logs in the user

200.description: Password set and user logged in

400.description: Passwords don't match or invalid request

post.description: Exchanges global JWT for a tenant-scoped JWT after workspace selection

403.description: User does not have access to the selected tenant

post.description: Sends a 6-digit verification code to the user's email for first-time login
Authenticates user and returns list of accessible workspaces with a global JWT
Validates reset token and updates the user's password
Verifies the OTP and returns a short-lived password reset token
Generates and sends a 6-digit OTP via the chosen channel (EMAIL or SMS)

400.description: Invalid channel or missing phone number

post.description: Returns available OTP delivery channels (email, SMS) for the user
Creates a new tenant organization and the first admin user. Returns a JWT token for immediate access.
Exchange refresh token for new access and refresh tokens

401.description: Invalid, expired, or reused refresh token

post.description: Revokes the refresh token and its entire rotation chain
Revokes all refresh tokens for the current user
Authenticates user and returns access and refresh tokens

get.description: Returns all roles assigned to a specific user
Returns all available permissions that can be assigned to roles
Returns permissions belonging to a specific module

get.summary: Get paginated notifications for the current tenant
List all maintenance requests for the current occupant
